hooks.command: CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git commit' && ! echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'amend'; then MSG=$(git log -1 --pretty=%B); if echo "$MSG" | grep -q 'Co-Authored-By'; then NEW_MSG=$(echo "$MSG" | sed 's/Co-Authored-By:/Assisted-by:/'); git commit --amend -m "$NEW_MSG" --no-verify 2>/dev/null; echo '[Trailer] Replaced Co-Authored-By with Assisted-by' >&2; fi; fi; exit 0
